title: Announcing Google Antigravity SDK
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into the agent-first era. It enables developers to manage agents across workspaces while operating at a task-oriented level. Agents autonomously plan and execute complex end-to-end tasks across editor, terminal, and browser.
